Learn Japanese To Survive! Hiragana Battle

notes: Windows version has to be set to XP for it to work, and scene transitions (black fade-in/-out) only cover ~3/4th of the screen. Everything else seems to work fine.
title: Learn Japanese To Survive! Hiragana Battle

notes: It is working with known tweaks so far (installed wine 3.0 directly from store, and set to XP compatibilty trough wine cfg). I am running it with steam proton 4.2-3, mostly playable, only one issue i have: on some parts of the map (eg. the farm and the town on North) the game slows down incredibly, a battle after better to call a comic book instead. I could not make to work of steam FPS counter for more precise data.
title: Learn Japanese To Survive! Hiragana Battle

notes: Open index.html from installation directory in Firefox. Game not working in Chrome. When you try to run it via Steam, you only hear a music and whole screen is black. Anyway, game is playable under Firefox but you have to not clear www data on exit ;-)
title: Learn Japanese To Survive! Hiragana Battle

notes: As the previous posts mentions, it doesn't seem to launch with Proton, but runs fine from the "index.html" file in the browser. HOWEVER, due to recent security fixes (addressing CVE-2019-11730), you have to set the "privacy.file_unique_origin" to "false" in about:config in Firefox to be able to play the game. After that it works perfectly as it used to.
title: Learn Japanese To Survive! Hiragana Battle

notes: Out-of-the-box I only get sound, and needed PROTON_USE_D9VK=1 PROTON_NO_D3D11=1 to get visuals as well. Still seeing a strange dark shadow over 1/3 of the screen sometimes, and characters movement appears slower than in win, but overall playable.
title: Learn Japanese To Survive! Hiragana Battle

notes: with PROTON_USE_D9VK=1 PROTON_NO_D3D11=1 it runs, only minor issue is a strange "shadow" which appears sometimes over the right 2/3 of the screen, and the game seems to be running slight slower than in win10, but neither are a dealbreaker
title: Learn Japanese To Survive! Hiragana Battle

notes: Inconsistent frame-rate on some screens, but still playable overall.
